result.summary: Found 3 major issues: text truncation in navigation and game cards, affecting readability and content visibility.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Game' displays as 'Hot Gam'
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width or font size to allow full text display without truncation, or implement text wrapping

issues.description: Game card titles in the Exclusive Games section are truncated - visible text shows partial titles like 'MAGNI PHOI' instead of complete game names
issues.suggestion: Increase the height of game card titles or implement multi-line text with proper overflow handling to display full game names

issues.description: Game cards appear to have insufficient space for text content, causing titles to be cut off across multiple exclusive and new game sections
issues.suggestion: Review the CSS constraints on game card containers and ensure adequate height/padding for text content, or reduce font size if space is limited
